title: Session One: The Breaking of Kharad-Vul
atAGlance: An emergency escape scenario through a collapsing mountain city under Underdark assault, ending with Divine Core awakening.
sageNotes: The Breaking of Kharad-Vul is remembered as the night bell-codes failed and whole terraces learned how quickly a city can fracture. Refugees still trade stories of Captain Brakka's last holds, Sister Halea's triage lines, Odrin's overworked lifts, and Vell's costly escape offers. Chroniclers mark it as the hour many future Ascendants first felt their cores answer under fire and ash.
gameInformation: Recommended sequence: Chain & Cask muster -> Lower Forges alarm -> Chainwell Gate breach -> Shrine of the Nine Rivets triage -> Crownflame Ignition -> Ash Lift escape. Milestone to level 2 on successful evacuation. Track Breach Clock each major delay and force hard tradeoffs at 2/4/6. Assign one faction attention tag per player based on who they aid, betray, or leave behind.
